"'''Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 15:2:22'''" was an in-universe [[HoloNet News (Insider)|HoloNet News]] issue published in [[Star Wars Insider 74|''Star Wars Insider'' 74]].

{{Magazine-stub|article}}

==Contents==
*''Clone Commander Graduates Ready For Action''
*''New Tagge Baron Leads Tech Initiative''

==Media==
===Collected in===
*<!-- 2004-02-24 -->[[Star Wars Insider 74|''Star Wars Insider'' 74]]
